VISITING JUDGE: J. WILLIAM BEARD;CLERK:ECLAVERIA; REPTR: MARILYN NORMAN 9:25AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF PRESENT AND APPEARING IN HIS OWN BEHALF AND DEFT PREGINA PIERRE NOT APPEARING. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.
